{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-287", "name": "Improper Authentication"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-613", "name": "Insufficient Session Expiration"}], "description": "### Impact
In eduMFA < 2.9.1 userless Passkey/WebAuthn challenges might be replayed and do not expire

### Patches
Fixed in eduMFA >= 2.9.1 by adding validity information to the userless challenges.

### Workarounds
No known workarounds besides disabling userless login altogether.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j5rm-v3vh-vx94", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-18T15:37:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j5rm-v3vh-vx94", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j5rm-v3vh-vx94"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-18T15:37:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/eduMFA/eduMFA/security/advisories/GHSA-j5rm-v3vh-vx94", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j5rm-v3vh-vx94"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/eduMFA/eduMFA/security-advisories/GHSA-j5rm-v3vh-vx94", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/eduMFA/eduMFA", "summary": "eduMFA Passkeys: missing expiration flag may allow replay attacks and reuse of old challenges ", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-18T15:37:01Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j5rm-v3vh-vx94", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.9.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "edumfa"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.9.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: eduMFA Passkeys: missing expiration flag may allow replay attacks and reuse of old challenges
